head.hi: Memorandum by Mr. Hugh S. Cumming, Jr., of the Division of European Affairs

div.p:
Dr. Gruening telephoned me today and said that he had received a memorandum from the President directing that American activities
in the Antarctic be known as “The United States Antarctic Service”.
The President preferred not to use the word “Expedition” since that contemplated a more or less temporary rather than permanent interest on the part of the United States in the Antarctic.
